data.title: Animoca Brands: Not involved in the launch of LIBRA tokens
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Animoca Brands officially issued a statement on the X platform to clarify that Animoca Brands invested in KIP Protocol in February 2024 along with many other investors, but Animoca Brands, Animoca Ventures, and Open Campus did not understand or participate in the launch and development of the LIBRA token.

data.title: KIP Protocol Co-founder: LIBRA project funds are still on the chain, KIP only assists in management as a fund distributor
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News KIP Protocol co-founder Julian posted on social media that, as mentioned in the original tweet of Argentine President Mile a few hours ago, the Libertad project aims to boost the Argentine economy by funding small projects and local businesses, supporting those who seek to develop businesses and contribute to national development.
Currently, these funds are still on the chain and no SOL will be moved. KIP Protocol's main role in this project is to help allocate funds to Argentine companies, not tokens, let alone market makers. It should be noted that LIBRA has no pre-sale, and all tokens are sold through a one-sided liquidity pool.
KIP Protocol will develop a plan to run the Libertad project based on the initial goals. No SOL will be used outside the purpose of running Project Viva La Libertad. More details will be announced later.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,700 USDT with a 0.13% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 15, 2025, 07:11 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,700 USDT and is now trading at 2,699.209961 USDT, with a narrowed 0.13% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Founder of Bridgewater Fund: Still holding BTC, but gold is more suitable for private holding and not taxed than BTC
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bridgewater Fund founder Ray Dalio talked about Bitcoin again in a recent podcast interview, and also mentioned the DeepSeek craze. He said that he saw currency depreciation through market trends, especially relative to gold, Bitcoin or other physical assets. More generally, all fiat currencies are depreciating, while gold, Bitcoin or other hard assets are relatively appreciating. Bitcoin or other digital assets are a topic worth discussing. Although commodities can hedge inflation, they do not have a storage function. People cannot hold oil or wheat for a long time as a wealth storage tool like holding gold or Bitcoin. 
In addition, he revealed that he still holds some Bitcoin, but it is far less than gold. Bitcoin is one of his diversified investments, but he prefers gold because gold has several unique advantages: it can flow freely between countries; central banks of various countries use it as a reserve asset; it is more difficult to regulate than Bitcoin and can be held more "privately"; and gold cannot be easily taxed, but Bitcoin is different-regulators know the transaction path of Bitcoin and it is easy to regulate and tax it.

data.title: LBank has launched LIBRA U-margined perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, LBank has launched the LIBRA U-based perpetual contract at 13:30 (SGT) on February 15, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50 times.
